# Copilot instructions
The canonical agent-instructions file for this repository is [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repo root — per the [agents.md](https://agents.md/) standard.
Read it. Everything an agent needs (hard rules, dev commands, test layout, PR checklist, architecture pointers) lives there.
This file exists only as a forward for tools that look at `.github/copilot-instructions.md` specifically.
